name: Calendly
description: Calendly is a scheduling automation platform that eliminates the back-and-forth of finding meeting times. Its REST API lets you manage event types, view scheduled events, check available times, and programmatically cancel or manage events. All resources are identified by URIs.

capabilities.name: list_event_types
capabilities.description: Retrieve all event types for a user or organization, including active, inactive, and draft types.

capabilities.name: list_scheduled_events
capabilities.description: List all scheduled events (past and upcoming) for a user with filtering by status and date range.

capabilities.name: get_invitee
capabilities.description: Get details about a specific invitee of a scheduled event, including their responses and tracking info.

capabilities.name: list_available_times
capabilities.description: Retrieve available time slots for an event type within a date range.

capabilities.name: cancel_event
capabilities.description: Cancel a scheduled event by its UUID, optionally providing a cancellation reason.

capabilities.name: get_user
capabilities.description: Retrieve the authenticated user's profile information including name, email, timezone, and scheduling URL.
